plugins.name: house-style
plugins.description: Coding standards and security practices for all agents. Covers minimal footprint, comment discipline, TDD, dry-run compliance, defense in depth, Rust guidelines, and task list discipline.

plugins.name: agent-skills
plugins.description: Core agent capabilities: escalation protocol, external research, task lifecycle management, sub-agent spawning, and stuck detection.

plugins.name: github-ops
plugins.description: GitHub Issue and PR operations via the gh CLI. Covers issue creation, updates, label management, work unit claiming/releasing, PR creation, and comment posting. All mutations are dry-run by default.

plugins.name: doc-ops
plugins.description: Planning document operations: frontmatter parsing, schema validation, staleness checks, validated writes with git commits, and stage gate checklists.

plugins.name: workflow-utils
plugins.description: Orchestration workflow utilities: feature dependency graph, context assembly, split proposals, state reconciliation, CI checks, instance pause/resume, escalation routing, multi-instance coordination, and L1 revision workflow.

plugins.name: code-quality
plugins.description: Toolchain-agnostic code quality checks: build, lint, test, and contract test runners. Commands are read from project.yaml. All failures are hard blocks.
